title: apocynum pumilum var. tomentellum
intro: Apocynum pumilum var. tomentellum, also known as the downy dogbane or downy hemp dogbane, is a plant species within the dogbane family (Apocynaceae). It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, diuretic, and cardiotonic effects. The health benefits of Apocynum pumilum var. tomentellum include the potential relief of edema, hypertension, and cardiac insufficiency, as well as its use as a natural diuretic to treat fluid retention. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions, and are often used in combination with other herbs to enhance their medicinal properties.
